Don't trade the siren. Trade the pressure chain.

A war headline is the alarm—not the portfolio map. Watch the pressure travel through Brent, producers, volatility and rates. Where does the chain break first for you?

Recorded July 15, 2026. News and education only. #markets #oil #geopolitics #riskmanagement #investing

Don't trade the siren. Trade the pressure chain.

A war headline is the alarm—not the portfolio map. Watch the pressure travel through Brent, producers, volatility and rates. Where does the chain break first for you?

Recorded July 15, 2026. News and education only. #markets #oil #geopolitics #riskmanagement #investing

The war is real. The market message is selective.

Brent is carrying a Strait of Hormuz premium, while energy stocks, the S&P 500, volatility and the ten-year tell us how far that pressure has—or has not—traveled. This episode maps the chain from shipping risk to crude, producers, inflation-sensitive assets and the wider portfolio.

News and education only. Not financial advice. Conditions and levels are not predictions.
